name: Lebanon
summary: Day 75 of Hormuz blockade. **A7 IDF GROUND TROOPS CROSSED THE LITANI RIVER MAY 12 NEAR ZAWTAR AL-SHARQIYAH (~10 KM from Israel-Lebanon border) = FIRST PUBLICLY-ACKNOWLEDGED ISRAELI GROUND CROSSING OF LITANI SINCE APRIL 16 CEASEFIRE** (CONFIRMED — Times of Israel liveblog primary May 12). Operation targeted Hezbollah military structures in overnight strikes; explosive drones at troops landed in open areas. **IDF CHIEF OF STAFF EYAL ZAMIR: 'there is no cease-fire in Lebanon' — most senior IDF officer publicly declaring ceasefire dead.** Lebanese Health Ministry ≥13 killed in Israeli attacks over prior 24h; cumulative war toll 2,704 killed / 8,311 wounded (Lebanese tally appears to draw from different reference framework than yesterday's 2,869; either way cumulative count rising daily). Hezbollah continues precision strikes on IDF gatherings at al-Taybe, Shama, Biyyada, Alman-Al-Qusayr triangle, Khallet al-Raj near Deir Siryan (Press TV / Iranian state). NO new Israeli soldier KIA beyond Glovanyov (5th, May 10) — total holds at 5 since ceasefire, but Litani crossing materially raises casualty + miscalculation risk. CGTN single-source May 12 SAM-at-IAF claim STILL NOT Western-corroborated. **Litani crossing is a CONFIRMED escalation of ground-tempo beyond air strikes — IDF crossed an unofficial post-ceasefire line BEYOND the May 11 Beirut southern-suburb strike.** ORIGINAL CONTEXT (May 12): **IDF STRIKES INTENSIFIED — 30+ LOCATIONS HIT MAY 11 across south and east Lebanon (evacuation warnings for Rihan, Jarjouaa, Kfar Roummane, Nmairiyeh, Arab Salim, Jmaijmeh, Mashgharah, Qellaya, Harouf); drone strike Zebdine killed 2 civilians distributing bread; airstrike on Abba killed 2/wounded 5; FIRST BEIRUT SOUTHERN-SUBURB STRIKE SINCE APRIL 16 CEASEFIRE.** Lebanese Health Ministry: ≥23 killed prior 24h; **cumulative war toll 2,869.** May 12: IDF strikes Adshit (3 strikes), Haris (1 strike, 7th cumulative on Haris), Dabaal — ≥7 killed, 7 wounded (Lebanese NNA). **HEZBOLLAH EXPLOSIVE DRONE STRIKE NEAR MANARA (just inside Israel) MAY 10 ~16:00 KILLED IDF RESERVIST WO ALEXANDER GLOVANYOV** = 5th IDF soldier killed post-April 16 ceasefire (all by FPV/explosive drones); Glovanyov is SOLDIER not CIVILIAN, **MAY 10 trigger for Israeli civilian casualty from Hezbollah EXPIRED UNTRIPPED, holds through May 12.** Civilian-inside-Israel ceiling has HELD across full window. **NEW VARIABLE MAY 12:** surface-to-air missile fired from Lebanon at IAF aircraft over south Lebanon; IDF launched interceptor; alerts triggered along Israel's Mediterranean coast (REPORTED — CGTN single-source, needs Israeli-side corroboration). Hezbollah claimed 24 attacks May 11 (artillery/drones/missiles at Khiam, Deir Seryan, Tayr Harfa, Bayyada, Rashaf, Naqoura) — Hezbollah-side CLAIMED, Israeli side reported only Glovanyov KIA. **Netanyahu CBS 60 Minutes May 11: war 'not over' until proxies neutralized; Haaretz framed as Netanyahu signaling Hezbollah fighting may continue DELIBERATELY after ceasefire.** Asymmetry continues: 2,869+ Lebanese killed cycle vs zero Israeli civilians inside Israel proper. Hezbollah SG Naim Qassem still 'categorically rejects' Lebanon-Israel direct talks. **The Beirut southern-suburb strike May 11 is a meaningful escalation marker — IDF crossed an unofficial post-ceasefire line.**

active_triggers.condition: Hezbollah-IDF kinetic produces Israeli civilian casualty within 14 days (by 2026-05-11) — full re-escalation activated

recent_signals.headline: A7 IDF GROUND TROOPS CROSSED LITANI RIVER MAY 12 NEAR ZAWTAR AL-SHARQIYAH (~10 KM from border) = FIRST PUBLICLY-ACKNOWLEDGED ISRAELI GROUND CROSSING OF LITANI SINCE APRIL 16 CEASEFIRE (CONFIRMED — ToI liveblog primary). Operation targeted Hezbollah military structures in overnight strikes; explosive drones at troops landed in open areas. IDF Chief Eyal Zamir: 'there is no cease-fire in Lebanon' = MOST SENIOR IDF OFFICER PUBLICLY DECLARING CEASEFIRE DEAD. Lebanese Health Ministry ≥13 killed prior 24h; cumulative toll 2,704 killed / 8,311 wounded (reference-framework discrepancy with yesterday's 2,869; count rising daily either way). Hezbollah continued precision strikes on IDF gatherings at al-Taybe, Shama, Biyyada, Alman-Al-Qusayr triangle, Khallet al-Raj near Deir Siryan (Press TV / Iranian state attribution). NO new Israeli soldier KIA beyond Glovanyov (5th, May 10) — total holds at 5 but Litani crossing materially raises casualty + miscalculation risk. CGTN single-source May 12 SAM-at-IAF claim STILL NOT Western-corroborated. Net escalation: IDF crossed unofficial post-ceasefire line BEYOND May 11 Beirut southern-suburb strike.
sources: Times of Israel liveblog May 12 (Litani crossing) — primary
Press TV (via Global Security Org) Hezbollah strikes — Iranian state
recent_signals.verification: Litani ground crossing May 12 = CONFIRMED (Times of Israel liveblog primary); Zamir 'no cease-fire' = CONFIRMED RHETORIC (IDF Chief on record); Lebanese cumulative casualty 2,704 (revised reference framework) = CONFIRMED (Lebanese Health Ministry primary); Hezbollah strike attributions = REPORTED (Press TV / Iranian state); SAM May 12 = REPORTED CGTN single-source.

recent_signals.headline: IDF STRIKES INTENSIFIED — 30+ Lebanon locations May 11 (evacuation warnings 9 villages); Zebdine drone strike killed 2 civilians distributing bread; Abba airstrike killed 2/wounded 5; FIRST BEIRUT SOUTHERN-SUBURB STRIKE SINCE APRIL 16 CEASEFIRE. Lebanese Health Ministry ≥23 killed prior 24h; cumulative war toll 2,869. May 12: IDF strikes Adshit (3), Haris (1, 7th cumulative), Dabaal — ≥7 killed, 7 wounded. Hezbollah drone strike near Manara May 10 killed IDF reservist Glovanyov = 5th IDF soldier KIA post-ceasefire (SOLDIER not CIVILIAN — May 10 trigger UNTRIPPED HOLDS through May 12). May 12: SAM fired from Lebanon at IAF aircraft (CGTN single-source, needs Israeli-side corroboration). Hezbollah claimed 24 attacks May 11. Netanyahu CBS 60 Minutes: war 'not over' until proxies neutralized; Haaretz frames as deliberate war-extension signal.
sources: Al Jazeera + Lebanese NNA + Wikipedia 2026 Lebanon war timeline + Detroit News + Democracy Now (IDF strikes Lebanon)
recent_signals.verification: IDF strikes 30+ locations + first Beirut southern-suburb strike since April 16 = CONFIRMED multi-source; Lebanese cumulative toll 2,869 = CONFIRMED (Lebanese Health Ministry primary); Glovanyov KIA = CONFIRMED multi-source; civilian-trigger UNTRIPPED HOLDS; SAM May 12 = REPORTED (CGTN single-source); Netanyahu 60 Minutes 'not over until proxies neutralized' = CONFIRMED RHETORIC

recent_signals.headline: DAY 14/14 OF TRIGGER WINDOW (closes today; trigger UNTRIPPED) — IDF STRUCK 85+ HEZBOLLAH TARGETS IN SOUTHERN LEBANON IN 24 HOURS (INCL. UNDERGROUND WEAPONS SITE IN BEQAA VALLEY, AFTER EVACUATION WARNINGS FOR 9 VILLAGES); 12 KILLED INCL. 7 IN SINGLE SAKSAKIYEH STRIKE (A GIRL AMONG THE DEAD); HEZBOLLAH DRONES WOUNDED 3 IDF RESERVISTS NEAR MISGAV AM (MILITARY TARGETS ONLY); MT. MERON DRONE IMPACT CORRECTED — IN TERRITORY ADJACENT TO LEBANON BORDER, NOT MERON AREA; 2 SOLDIERS WOUNDED (ONE SERIOUSLY). Coordination-decay framework holds: capability demonstrated on both sides, but civilian-inside-Israel ceiling has HELD. Trigger window expires today with trigger UNTRIPPED. Asymmetry continues: Lebanese casualties cumulating, ZERO Israeli civilians inside Israel proper. Hezbollah SG Naim Qassem still 'categorically rejects' Lebanon-Israel direct talks.
sources: Times of Israel May 9-10 live blogs
recent_signals.verification: CONFIRMED multi-source — IDF 85+ targets primary; 12 Lebanese killed incl. Saksakiyeh primary multi-source; 3 IDF reservists wounded by Hezbollah drones = CONFIRMED (JPost, IDF acknowledged); Mt. Meron correction = CONFIRMED (Times of Israel correction); trigger UNTRIPPED Day 14/14

recent_signals.headline: DAY 13/14 OF TRIGGER WINDOW — HEZBOLLAH FIRST CROSS-BORDER DRONE REACH OF CYCLE: 'SWARM OF DRONES' STRUCK MT. MERON IDF AIR-TRAFFIC-CONTROL BASE INSIDE ISRAEL PROPER MAY 8 (MILITARY TARGET, NO CASUALTIES); ISRAELI AIRSTRIKES KILLED 5-10 LEBANESE FRIDAY (PARAMEDIC, 2 CHILDREN, 3 WOMEN AT TOURA, KFAR CHOUBA, OTHERS); 4 HEZBOLLAH MEMBERS KILLED IN BAFLIYEH CAR STRIKE SATURDAY; TRIGGER 'ISRAELI CIVILIAN CASUALTY INSIDE ISRAEL PROPER' UNTRIPPED. Hezbollah dialed capability without breaking ceiling — military targeting + no casualties = coordination-decay framework holds. Mt. Meron is IDF's primary northern air-traffic-control facility ~8 km from Lebanon border. Day 14 (~May 10) last day of originally-flagged window.
recent_signals.verification: CONFIRMED multi-source — Mt. Meron drone swarm + Lebanese casualties + Bafliyeh strike all multi-source; trigger UNTRIPPED at Day 13/14 (capability demonstrated, ceiling intact)

recent_signals.headline: ISRAELI ESCALATION IN LEBANON DESPITE IRAN PAUSE: BEIRUT SUBURBS STRIKE MAY 6 KILLED HEZBOLLAH RADWAN COMMANDER MALEK BALLOUT (FIRST ISRAELI STRIKE ON LEBANESE CAPITAL SINCE MID-APRIL CEASEFIRE); 13 KILLED SOUTHERN/EASTERN LEBANON MAY 5-6; FORCED DISPLACEMENT ORDERS FOR 12 VILLAGES (mostly north of Litani — outside occupation zones, in violation of April 16 ceasefire). PM Netanyahu personally announced ordering Beirut strike. Day 11/14 trigger window — Hezbollah HAS NOT retaliated; ALL casualties Lebanese, ZERO Israeli civilians inside Israel proper.
recent_signals.verification: CONFIRMED multi-source — Beirut strike + Ballout killing + 13 casualties + 12-village displacement orders all multi-source confirmed; Hezbollah non-retaliation = CONFIRMED via absence-of-action documented by all sources

recent_signals.headline: DAY 10/14 TRIGGER WINDOW — HEZBOLLAH ROCKETS+DRONE NO IDF CASUALTIES; IDF SUCCESSFULLY INTERCEPTED AERIAL TARGETS BEFORE ISRAELI TERRITORY; GERMAN FM BAERBOCK 'EVERY RIGHT' FRAMING; ASYMMETRY FRAMEWORK 2,659+ LEBANESE KILLED VS ZERO ISRAELI CIVILIANS
IDF STRUCK 20+ SOUTH LEBANON LOCATIONS MAY 4; HEZBOLLAH MORTARS RETALIATED (NO IDF CASUALTIES); ONE-SIDED TEMPO CONTINUES; DAY 9/14 TRIGGER WINDOW NO ISRAELI CIVILIAN CASUALTY
LEBANON 80+ KILLED 48 HOURS BY IDF STRIKES — CEASEFIRE OPERATIONALLY DEAD MAY 1-2
KINETIC DAY 2 — IDF STRUCK 20+ HEZBOLLAH-LINKED SITES MONDAY; 14-DAY ISRAELI-CIVILIAN-CASUALTY TRIGGER STILL WATCHING

recent_signals.headline: SUBSTANTIVE CEASEFIRE COLLAPSED: HEZBOLLAH LETHAL DRONE KILLED IDF SGT

historical_summaries.summary: 6 signals. Israel launched ground incursion into southern Lebanon against Hezbollah | At least 41 killed in Israeli air attacks on Bekaa Valley | Lebanese PM Salam demanded Hezbollah surrender weapons and restrict to political activities

31 signals. Beirut airstrike killed Hezbollah's southern front commander Haj Youssef Ismail Hashem on April 1 — the most senior Hezbollah commander kill | Israel struck Lebanon April 1 concurrent with Trump primetime address and ongoing Iran campaign | Israeli strikes killed 2 girls and wounded 40 near Tyre
